---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new hook, skill, command, or profile.
labels: enhancement
---

## What would you like the plugin to do?

<!-- A clear, concise description of the feature. -->

## Why does it matter?

<!-- What use case does this unlock? If it's hypothetical, say so. -->

## Where would it live?

<!-- Tick one or more -->

- [ ] New hook (event: `SessionStart` / `UserPromptSubmit` / `PreToolUse` / `PostToolUse` / `Stop` / `PreCompact` / `SessionEnd`)
- [ ] New skill (auto-invoked by Claude)
- [ ] New slash command (`/memex:...`)
- [ ] New profile under `templates/profiles/`
- [ ] New rule in an existing profile's `.rules/`
- [ ] Change to `memex.config.json` schema
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Something else: <!-- describe -->

## Sketch (optional)

<!-- Pseudo-code, a config snippet, or a folder-tree diff. -->

## Alternatives you considered

<!-- What else did you think about before landing here? -->
